hero.title: Diego is a <primary>front-end developer</primary> and <primary>problem solver</primary>
hero.subtitle: He crafts responsive websites where technologies meet creativity

projects.title: projects
projects.appDescription1: Manage your daily tasks: track what’s done, pending, and in progress.
projects.appDescription2: Personal portfolio showcasing my projects, skills, and creative work.
projects.smallApp1: Simple app that fetches and displays GitHub user data by username.
projects.smallApp2: Simple weather app showing live data by city.

aboutMe.p2: I'm a front-end developer based in Lima, Peru, with a degree in Informatics Engineering from the Pontifical Catholic University of Peru, the top university in the country.
aboutMe.p3: I specialize in building responsive, modern web experiences from scratch, turning ideas into clean and functional interfaces. Bridging technical knowledge with a strong eye for design has been my drive since I started coding.
aboutMe.p4: I'm currently focused on growing as a front-end developer, working with technologies like React, Next.js, TypeScript and Tailwind to build fast and user-friendly products. I'm always pushing to learn what's next in the frontend world and looking for the right team to grow with.
aboutMe.t1: I approach development by building things from scratch and understanding how they work internally.
aboutMe.t2: I enjoy turning ideas into real, functional products through hands-on practice.
aboutMe.t3: I pay close attention not only to how things work, but also to how they feel and look.
aboutMe.t4: I care about creating interfaces that are clean, intuitive, and user-friendly.
aboutMe.t5: I'm constantly learning by building, iterating and improving with every project.

contact.text: I'm currently looking for full-time or internship opportunities in front-end development. That said, if you have any questions or just want to connect, don't hesitate to reach out.
